summary_one_line: A well-formed sfnt/cmap table whose only encoding record carries platform=0 encoding=0, so find_subtable(0,0) matches.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A structurally valid sfnt header (version 00 01 00 00) with a 'cmap' table whose encoding records sanitize, and where the only matching subtable is the last-tried (platform=0, encoding=0) record, so the chain of higher-priority find_subtable lookups (3,0)/(3,10)/(0,6)/(0,4)/(3,1)/(0,3)/(0,2)/(0,1) all miss and the (0,0) lookup at line 1837 finally hits.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner seeds begin with the canonical sfnt version 00 01 00 00 followed by a coherent table directory whose records include the 'cmap' tag, so the cmap table sanitizes and EncodingRecord::cmp/sanitize run (534 and 234 W hits vs 0 L); the (0,0) lookup at L1837 takes the True side 10/0 for W vs 0/20 for L.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds are short and unstructured (13-62 bytes of high-entropy bytes like e0 17 00 00 / 92 92 92), the cmap encoding records never sanitize so EncodingRecord::cmp/sanitize get 0 L hits, and L1837 stays False (T=0 F=20), falling through to return &Null at L1840.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which copies the compared table-tag / encoding-record constants (e.g. the 'cmap' fourcc and the (platform,encoding) shorts compared in EncodingRecord::cmp) directly from the CMP buffer into the input, building the exact byte layout that satisfies the nested find_subtable comparisons; value_profile only has CMP_MAP Hamming-distance feedback and no I2S substitution mutator, so it cannot place those multi-byte constants and stalls at the False side.

evidence_trail.claim: The decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog beating value_profile with an I2S technique delta.
The blocked side is the True branch of the find_subtable(0,0) lookup at line 1837.
The (0,0) lookup is the last in a chain of higher-priority find_subtable lookups that all must miss first.
Winner takes the True side at L1837 ten times while loser takes the False side twenty times.
EncodingRecord comparison and sanitize run hundreds of times for the winner but never for the loser, indicating the cmap encoding records only sanitize for structured winner inputs.
Winner seeds carry the canonical sfnt version 00 01 00 00 and a cmap table tag.
Loser seeds are short and unstructured, e.g. a 13-byte high-entropy input.
Winner bytes at the sfnt-header offsets are concentrated and differ sharply from the loser's scattered bytes.
value_profile_cmplog's mutator set includes I2SRandReplace whereas value_profile's does not.
value_profile_cmplog explicitly adds I2SRandReplace to the havoc/token stack.
value_profile's feedback is CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix distance buckets, not state substitution.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5430 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 2 --seed 9b29484356b4664e` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 21 of the 22-level ancestor chain (ancestor e0a5b09f80625fb6), consistent with an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in vpc.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on find_subtable(0,0) where value_profile (CMP_MAP only) resolves the True branch as often as value_profile_cmplog, showing I2S substitution is not what places the (platform,encoding) constants.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte diff does not pinpoint a single (platform=0, encoding=0) two-byte encoding-record field; the structural argument rests on the cmap-tag header plus EncodingRecord::cmp/sanitize hit-count divergence rather than an exact offset for the (0,0) match.
